Author: DriftlessDigits
Name: Scrooge
Punchline: A gil saved is a gil earned.
Description: "You might say that everythin's for sale here in Ul'dah — as long as you've got the gil." — Momodi Modi
Changelog: Lane pricing. Pinch now prices from where an item ACTUALLY sells (your recency-weighted sale lane), not from whatever is listed: dream walls and lowball bait get ignored with the evidence named in the run log, and a 55M troll wall walks itself back into the real lane with zero clicks from you. New: when you own the whole board, Scrooge asks a 2x lane premium instead of chasing ceilings. New: below-lane price races are never chased - Scrooge waits at the lane floor. New: your own listings never count as competition. New: market board timeouts retry before holding. New: thin local sale history falls back to data-center-wide sales (clearly labeled community lane). Run log rewritten in plain market language.
